titleStmt.title: SII 25.122: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 122. (A.R. No. 122 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

This record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 14th century. The details of the date of the record viz., year 44, Dhanus 5, śu 1, Mūla-nakshatra regularly correspond to 1339 A.D., December 2.

The inscription records the sale of dēvadāna, tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam, kuḍippaṟṟu lands at Tirupputtūr executed, as pāḍikāval by the mūlaparushai-mahāsabhai of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu to a certain Avayaṉ Avayaṉ alias Māḷavachchakravarthi of Śūraikkuḍi in Tēnāṟṟup-pōkku in Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍu, after receiving the sale price of the right of 250 vāḷāl-vaḻi-tiṟandāṉ-paṇam from the latter. The purchaser has to give ten marakkāl of paddy for one mā of land measured by four foot span as pāḍikāval privilege. Āyirattu-eḻunūṟṟu-mūvēndiravēḷḍṉ figures as a signatory of this transaction.

This record has to be placed prior to the date of the record No. 120 belonging to the reign period of the same king. Besides the earlier date assigned to the present record, the sequence also supports it. In the other record (No. 120) referred to above, the pāḍikāval rights were given away to a certain Viśālayadēva out of gratitude for his meritorious deed. The mahāsabhai would have resorted to his act because Māḷavachchakravarti was in all probability not able to defend the onslaught of the Muhammadans.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭaivaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 4vatu dhanu nāyaṟṟu
5 10 2yum pūrvvapakṣattu prathamaiyum brahaspativāramum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ keraḷaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu
brahmadeyan tirupputtūr mūlaparuṣai mahāsabhai yom Ataḷaiyūr nāṭṭut teṉāṟṟup pokku
cūraikkuṭi Avayaṉ Avayaṉāṉa māḷavaccakravattikaḷukku pāṭi kāval vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricā
vatu nammur nāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kuṭippaṟṟu Aṉaittu muṟṟum pāṭikāvalā
ka viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ippaṭi viṟṟu pāṭikāvalukku vilaip poruḷāka vilai
niccayittu paṟṟiṉa vāḷāl vaḻi tiṟantāṉ 2 100 5 10 Irunūṟṟu Aiympatum paṟṟikkoṇṭu Ippa
ṭi viṟṟa pāṭikāval Ūril pāṭikāval mariyātiparicarittu koḷvitākavum Irupattunāṟcāṇ kolāl Orumāvukku
Ari coṟṟuk kuṟuṇi Uṭpaṭa māttāl viḷainta nilattukku pattu mākkāl nellu yiṭuvatākavum
Ippaṭi cammatittu pāṭikāval vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Ippāṭi kāval cantrātittavarc celvatāka
pāṭikāval vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Avayaṉ Avayaṉāṉa māḷavac cakravattikku ḻulaparuṣarmmahā sabhai
yom Āyirattu Eḻunūṟṟu muventiraveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
